features.name: First Attack
features.description: On your turn, you can make one extra attack with any weapon after your first attack.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: You can use a bonus action on your turn to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description: You gain additional attacks as part of your Action Surge feature. The number of extra attacks depends on your level: 2 at 5th level, 3 at 11th level, and 4 at 17th level.

features.name: Improved Initiative
features.description: You can take the Dash action as a bonus action on each of your turns. If you do so, you can’t take any other bonus actions that turn.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Starting at 2nd level, you can push yourself beyond your limits for a moment. As a bonus action, you can take one additional action on your turn. Starting at 6th level, you can use this feature twice before needing to finish a long rest to recover the use of it. At 18th level, you can use this feature three times before needing to finish a long rest.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice instead of once on your turn if you are not incapacitated.

data.hit_die: d10 per fighter level + Constitution modifier

Did you take up the sword as a way to escape the limits of a family of life on farm, are following proud tradition? Where you might have acquired weapons and tools: none. They might have been military ar heirlooms. perhaps you scrimped and saved years.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: You can spend a first-level or higher spell slot to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + the spell slot level.
